summary: Comprehensive 7-phase plan to enhance the LDM College ERP application to world-class quality. Covers: shared DashboardLayout with sidebar, reusable ERP components (StatCard, DataTable, FileUploader, TimetableGrid etc.), Admin enhancements (Master Data, CSV Upload, Timetable, Fees, Exams), Teacher enhancements (Attendance Entry, Marks Entry, Student Performance), Student sub-pages (Attendance, Marks, Timetable, Fees), Employee additions (Duties, Payroll), new Parent Portal, and animation/polish pass using framer-motion. All changes are non-destructive additions to existing UI. Includes 20+ new routes and verification plan.
